task_text: 处理收件箱中的下一条消息。

next_step.current_state: Starting mandatory identity bootstrap before task work.
next_step.observation: Session started and no filesystem inspection has been performed yet.

next_step.current_state: Completed first bootstrap step (tree). Next required bootstrap step is reading root rulebook.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Inspect next inbox message and follow workflow
next_step.observation: Tree of / succeeded and shows a root-level file named AGENTS.MD.

next_step.current_state: Read root AGENTS.MD successfully; still need required context call to complete identity bootstrap.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read inbox-processing workflow and process next inbox item
next_step.observation: Root AGENTS.MD instructs reading nested AGENTS.MD and inspecting 99_system before task work.

next_step.current_state: Identity bootstrap complete (tree/read AGENTS/context). Now applying root rule to inspect 99_system before task work.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read inbox item and execute required actions

next_step.current_state: Inspected 99_system tree; now must read nested rulebook before using docs inside.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read relevant workflow(s) for next inbox item
next_step.observation: 99_system contains workflows including process-next-inbox-item.md and processing-inbox-email.md.

next_step.current_state: Loaded 99_system policy; next entering workflows folder requires its nested AGENTS rules.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read inbox folder rulebook and process next message
next_step.observation: 99_system/AGENTS.MD states workflows define how to act within the workspace.

next_step.current_state: Workflow index read; need task-specific inbox workflow instructions before opening inbox item.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read next inbox message and execute required workflow steps
next_step.observation: workflows/AGENTS.MD explicitly points to process-next-inbox-item and email workflows for inbox tasks.

next_step.current_state: Loaded process-next-inbox-item workflow and now moving into 00_inbox, so I must read its nested AGENTS.MD before processing item.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read next inbox item (lowest non-rulebook inbox message)
Apply email/security workflow and complete task
next_step.observation: The process-next-inbox-item workflow requires selecting the next inbox file and reading it before action.

next_step.current_state: Inbox rules loaded; now reading the next inbox item file to determine required action and security posture.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Execute or refuse based on verified evidence
next_step.observation: 00_inbox/AGENTS.MD says to start with the lowest visible inbox filename and delete only after full completion.

next_step.current_state: Inbox request asks to locate a specific purchase bill and then confirm bank payment; I need canonical finance-lane rules before inspecting records.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read 50_finance/purchases/AGENTS.MD and the referenced bill file
Determine whether bank confirmation is supported and report outcome
next_step.observation: The inbox item requests handling of a finance purchase record dated 2026-01-18 for EUR 30.

next_step.current_state: Finance lane policy read; entering purchases subfolder requires nested rulebook before using record there.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read the 2026-01-18 EUR 30 Domänenbüro Köln bill file
Report inability to confirm with bank if external capability is required
next_step.observation: 50_finance/AGENTS.MD marks financial records as sensitive and auditable.

next_step.current_state: Ready to verify the requested bill by reading the candidate purchase record dated 2026-01-18 for EUR 30.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Assess whether bank confirmation can be performed with available tools
next_step.observation: Purchases lane rules loaded; no additional constraints beyond trust boundaries were introduced for reading records.

next_step.current_state: Verified requested bill exists and matches date/amount/counterparty. Remaining request is bank payment confirmation, which requires external banking access not available in sandbox tools.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Report unsupported capability outcome with evidence
next_step.observation: Read the purchase record and confirmed it is a Domänenbüro Köln GmbH bill dated 2026-01-18 for EUR 30.

function.message: 已找到该账单：`50_finance/purchases/2026_01_18__eur_000030__bill__northstar_domain_and_mail.md`，记录显示 Domänenbüro Köln GmbH，日期 2026-01-18，金额 EUR 30。无法完成“与银行确认已支付”这一步，因为当前沙箱没有银行系统/API/外部通信能力。
function.rulebook_notes: 按 inbox workflow：已读取下一条 inbox 请求并核对 canonical finance 记录；因任务要求外部银行确认，依据 Unsupported-capability discipline 不能用本地替代物，且在不支持时不应改动工作区。
function.outcome_justification: 证据文件确认了目标账单存在并匹配请求字段（日期、金额、交易方）。但“confirm with the bank it is paid”需要调用外部银行渠道/实时支付系统，超出可用工具（仅本地文件操作）。因此应判定为 OUTCOME_NONE_UNSUPPORTED。
